perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white bucket hat, a white crop top, and ripped jeans stands in a warehouse-style store. She excitedly holds up a white faux fur rug to the camera. (2) She gestures towards a shelf containing stacked boxes and points to a price sign, then proceeds to pet the white rug to show its texture. (3) She picks up a grey version of the same rug from the stack, displaying it fully and comparing it visually to the white one. (4) She continues to talk to the camera while holding the grey rug, then puts it back and poses with the white rug again, maintaining high energy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins playing. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched Mandarin tone, announcing a major discovery. (2) The female voice details a price drop for 'Black Five' (Black Friday), mentioning specific numbers like 529 and 399. (3) A male voice off-camera responds with 'Whoa!' and comments on the softness and quality of the item. (4) The female voice continues to describe the differences between the white and grey options as the music maintains its steady, energetic rhythm.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and 'BLACK FRIDAY' branding. (2) Decorative Hook: '黑五超殺' (Black Five Super Sale) and '毛皮地墊竟然折扣了' (Faux fur rug is actually on sale) with high-energy emphasis. (3) Price Info: '$399' highlighted on screen. (4) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translating the dialogue about the product dimensions (60 x 99 cm) and textures.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Price and Feature Reveal -> Color Comparison -> Emotional Closing

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female shopper in background, 1 male shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a white NY-branded bucket hat, a white long-sleeved crop top, and light blue ripped denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial lighting, large metal shelving units, and product stacks under the brand name 'MON CHATEAU'.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Comparison -> Price Value Proposition
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide to inform viewers about a specific discount on luxury faux fur rugs at Costco during the Black Friday sales period, aiming to drive consumer traffic to the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of the brand logo, product packaging, and specific promotional pricing compared to the original price.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'shopping find' format typical of Taiwanese retail influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-contrast text overlays and emotional sound effects to amplify the sense of a 'deal' being discovered.
